title: WORKSOURCE OREGON - 211info
text: WORKSOURCE OREGON WORKSOURCE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A network of public and private partners working together for job seekers and businesses: -Provide resources to help unemployed and underemployed individuals connect with the employers that are right for them, find the jobs they are looking for, get trained for the jobs they want, and meet unemployment benefit requirements -Ensure businesses have access to a skilled, work-ready talent pool aligned with industry needs -Provide employers with resources to strengthen their workforce and grow their business -Offer job training, career development, and pre-layoff support services Locator Salem, OR 97311 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 772-2300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 772-2300 Holly Whittleton Alternate (833) 685-0845 Language other than English Language Access Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for local office locations and more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Career Counseling Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Computer Literacy Training Programs Job Development Job Finding Assistance Layoff Preparation Prejob Guidance Public Internet Access Sites Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - PRIORITY SERVICE FOR VETERANS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WORKSOURCE OREGON
